channel.title: Podcast auf Deutsch
channel.description: English podcasts translated to German with AI. Native German voices, natural conversation style.
channel.itunes:author: Podcast auf Deutsch
channel.itunes:summary: English podcasts translated to German with AI. Native German voices, natural conversation style.

item.title: [DE] Freakonomics (Test Clip)
item.description: German translation of 'Freakonomics (Test Clip)' from If Books Could Kill.
item.itunes:author: If Books Could Kill

item.title: [DE] Freakonomics — If Books Could Kill
item.description:
🇩🇪 KI-Übersetzung | Original: If Books Could Kill
In 2005, two men named Steven and Stephen published the quintessential airport book. In 2022, two men named Mike and Peter started a whole podcast just to make fun of it.
item.itunes:author: If Books Could Kill
